title: NEW Gemini Features Explained — How to Use Google’s Latest AI Upgrade
summary: Google released Gemini 3.5 Flash, a multimodal AI model offering video understanding, extended context analysis, structured output generation, and workspace integrations. The model demonstrates capabilities across vision, code generation, contract analysis, and agentic automation workflows.
